title: odontarrhena pateri subsp. pateri
intro: Odontarrhena pateri subsp. pateri, also known as pater's odontarrhena, is a flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of pater's odontarrhena are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential remedy for skin irritations and infections. In herbal preparations, pater's odontarrhena is often used as a topical application, such as a cream or ointment, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
